_comment: Two-tier host trust model for aider-relay (KB-2026-039).
Tier H-1 (always allowed on host): file ops + git reads.
File ops are side-effect-free on the workspace the agent owns.
Git reads are needed for MTARP session.json population.
Tier H-2 (container exec gateway): podman / devpod / devcontainer exec.
ALL build, test, git-write, and install operations must route
through one of these gateways. Podman/Docker is the actual sandbox.
The container image (polyglot-devcontainers) is the trust boundary.
Everything else is absent from this list and will be blocked by
